title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 427.170 - Severability — nonimpairment
text:
427.170.  Severability — nonimpairment. — The provisions of sections 427.110 to 427.190 are severable under section 1.140 and shall not impair any other remedies, rights, or options available to a creditor pursuant to any law, regulation, ruling, court order, contract, or agreement.
(L. 1997 H.B. 257)
